query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of a young child wearing a horizontally striped long-sleeve shirt, viewed from behind while standing and reaching toward tall vertical blinds that cover a bright window. A leafy houseplant sits on the windowsill in the lower right corner. The child is positioned on the left side of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph of a young child wearing a striped shirt, viewed from behind while reaching toward vertical blinds covering a window. The image employs extreme exposure, rendering the child as a near-total silhouette with crushed black shadows while the window light is blown out into an overexposed white glare, simplifying the scene into stark graphic contrast. A leafy houseplant sits on the windowsill in the lower right corner near the blown-out light.
